meaning: academy of classical learning (Tang Dynasty - Qing Dynasty)
sentence: 这座古老的书院培养了不少历史名人。
pinyin: Zhè zuò gǔ lǎo de shū yuàn péi yǎng le bù shǎo lì shǐ míng rén.
english: This ancient academy cultivated quite a few historically prominent figures.

sentence: 她预约了一次推油按摩，好好放松一下。
pinyin: Tā yù yuē le yī cì tuī yóu àn mó, hǎo hǎo fàng sōng yī xià.
english: She booked an oil massage to properly relax.

meaning: Chinese pearleaf crabapple (Malus asiatica); gift for a wedding or oth
sentence: 树上结满了红彤彤的花红，看起来很诱人。
pinyin: Shù shàng jié mǎn le hóng tóng tóng de huā hóng, kàn qǐ lái hěn yòu rén.
english: The tree is full of bright red crabapples that look very appetizing.

meaning: to cover (a statue) with gold leaf; to gild; (fig.) to prettify; to gl
sentence: 你别给自己贴金了，这件事大家都清楚。
pinyin: Nǐ bié gěi zì jǐ tiē jīn le, zhè jiàn shì dà jiā dōu qīng chǔ.
english: Stop glorifying yourself — everyone knows the truth about this matter.

meaning: (of a perpetrator, victim, weapon, sum of money etc) to be involved in
sentence: 涉案的三名嫌疑人已被警方逮捕。
pinyin: Shè àn de sān míng xián yí rén yǐ bèi jǐng fāng dài bǔ.
english: The three suspects involved in the case have been arrested by police.
